name: Gingerbread Teddy Bears (Leti Labell)
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup dark corn syrup, light corn syrup, or molasses
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine butter, brown sugar, and corn syrup. Cook and stir over medium heat until butter is melted and sugar is dissolved.
2. Pour into a large mixing bowl. Cool 5 minutes.
3. Mix flour, cinnamon, ginger, soda, and cloves. Add egg and vanilla to butter mixture; mix well. Add flour mixture; beat until well mixed.
4. Divide dough in half. Cover; chill 2 hours or OVERNIGHT.
5. For each bear:
a. Shape dough into one 1-inch ball, one 3/4 inch ball, six 1/2 inch balls, and five 1/4 inch balls.
b. On an ungreased cookie sheet, flatten the 1-inch ball to 1/2 inch for the body. Attach the 3/4 inch ball for the head, and flatten to 1/2 inch.
c. Attach the 1/2 inch balls for arms, legs, and ears. Place one of the 1/4 inch balls on the head for the nose. Arrange the remaining 1/4 inch balls atop the ends of the arms and legs for paws.
d. Use miniature chocolate pieces for the eyes and navel.
6. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 8 to 10 minutes, or until done. Remove and cool on a wire rack.
7. If desired, pipe on bow ties with Decorator Icing.
